code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    let n = tokens.len()
    mut out = ""
    mut i = n - 1
    while i >= 0
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        if out == ""
          out = t
        else
          out = "#{out} #{t}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i - 1
    end
    println(out)
    Ok(())
  when None
    Ok(())
  end
end
